title: Crypto-JS module not found in n8n code node
symptom: When trying to use the 'crypto-js' module in a code node, n8n throws 'Cannot find module 'crypto-js''. This prevents the execution of the workflow.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The 'crypto-js' module is not included by default in n8n's environment. To use it, you need to explicitly allow it as an external module in the environment variables or build a custom n8n image with it installed.
fix_steps: Alternatively, build a custom n8n Docker image with 'crypto-js' installed
Use the built-in 'crypto' module if possible
agent_instruction: Set the NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL variable or build a custom n8n image with 'crypto-js'.
